2026-04-23T05:23:14.5683293Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T05:23:14.5683714Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T05:23:14.5684302Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T05:23:14.5684618Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m

Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. The title appears as the main heading, so keep it brief and descriptive.","type":"string"}},"required":["title","body"],"type":"object"},"name":"create_issue"},{"description":"Report that a tool or capability needed to complete the task is not available, or share any information you deem important about missing functionality or limitations. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. This is the first stable release and introduced the package to the repository including:\n- `ConfidentialLedgerResource` with a new `FilesExportAsync` long-running operation\n- New model properties on `ConfidentialLedgerProperties`: `EnclavePlatform`, `ApplicationType`, `ScittConfiguration`, `HostLevel`, `MaxBodySizeInMb`, `SubjectName`, `NodeCount`, `WriteLBAddressPrefix`, `WorkerThreads`\n- New enums: `ConfidentialLedgerEnclavePlatform`, `ConfidentialLedgerApplicationType`\n\nThe README was created from a boilerplate template with no service-specific content.\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **No service-specific examples**: The \"Examples\" section only links to the generic management samples URL (`https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples`); there are no inline code examples or snippet placeholders (`\\`\\`\\`C# Snippet:...\\`\\`\\``)\n- **No snippet test file**: `tests/Scenario/Samples/` does not exist; the generated samples in `tests/Generated/Samples/` are not wired to the README via `#region Snippet:` tags, so `Update-Snippets.ps1` produces no output\n- **`FilesExportAsync` not documented**: The new LRO operation for exporting ledger files is not mentioned anywhere in the README\n- **New model properties not documented**: `EnclavePlatform`, `ApplicationType`, `ScittConfiguration`, and the CCF tuning properties (`HostLevel`, `MaxBodySizeInMb`, `NodeCount`, etc.) added in 1.1.0 are not described\n- **\"Key concepts\" section is generic**: Does not mention `ConfidentialLedgerResource`, `ConfidentialLedgerCollection`, `ConfidentialLedgerData`, or the supported operations (Get, Create, Update, Delete, FilesExport)\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n**File:** `sdk/confidentialledger/Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger/README.md` — Edit\n\nReplace the placeholder sections with service-specific content:\n\n1. **Key concepts** section — replace the generic link with a description of the main types:\n\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerResource`** — Represents a provisioned Confidential Ledger instance. Supports get, update, delete, and the `FilesExportAsync` long-running operation.\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerCollection`** — Scoped to a resource group; supports listing, creating, and checking for the existence of ledgers. Accessible via `ResourceGroupResource.GetConfidentialLedgers()`.\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerData`** — Data bag for a ledger, including `Properties` (of type `ConfidentialLedgerProperties`), tags, and location.\n- **`ConfidentialLedgerProperties`** — Configures ledger type (`ConfidentialLedgerType`), SKU (`ConfidentialLedgerSku`), AAD and certificate-based security principals, running state, enclave platform, application type, and SCITT configuration.\n```\n\n2. **Examples** section — replace the generic link with snippet placeholders:\n\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\n### Create a Confidential Ledger\n\n```C# Snippet:ConfidentialLedger_CreateOrUpdate\n```\n\n### Get a Confidential Ledger\n\n```C# Snippet:ConfidentialLedger_Get\n```\n\n### Export Ledger Files\n\n```C# Snippet:ConfidentialLedger_FilesExport\n```\n\n### Delete a Confidential Ledger\n\n```C# Snippet:ConfidentialLedger_Delete\n```\n\nCode samples for using the management library for .NET can also be found in the following locations:\n- [.NET Management Library Code Samples](https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples)\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\nCreate a new test file at:\n`sdk/confidentialledger/Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger/tests/Scenario/Samples/Sample_ConfidentialLedger.cs`\n\nUse the following as a template (adapt resource IDs and properties as needed):\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Core;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing async Task CreateOrUpdate_Sample()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:ConfidentialLedger_CreateOrUpdate\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"DummyResourceGroupName\";\n            string ledgerName = \"DummyLedgerName\";\n\n            ResourceIdentifier resourceGroupId = ResourceGroupResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName);\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = client.GetResourceGroupResource(resourceGroupId);\n\n            ConfidentialLedgerCollection ledgers = resourceGroup.GetConfidentialLedgers();\n\n            ConfidentialLedgerData data = new ConfidentialLedgerData(AzureLocation.EastUS)\n            {\n                Properties = new ConfidentialLedgerProperties\n                {\n                    LedgerType = ConfidentialLedgerType.Public,\n                    LedgerSku = ConfidentialLedgerSku.Standard,\n                },\n            };\n\n            ArmOperation\u003cConfidentialLedgerResource\u003e lro = await ledgers.CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, ledgerName, data);\n            ConfidentialLedgerResource ledger = lro.Value;\n\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Succeeded on id: {ledger.Data.Id}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public ArmClient(cred);\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001\";\n            string resourceGroupName = \"DummyResourceGroupName\";\n            string ledgerName = \"DummyLedgerName\";\n\n            ResourceIdentifier ledgerId = ConfidentialLedgerResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId, resourceGroupName, ledgerName);\n            ConfidentialLedgerResource ledger = client.GetConfidentialLedgerResource(ledgerId);\n\n            ConfidentialLedgerFilesExportContent content = new ConfidentialLedgerFilesExportContent\n            {\n                DestinationStorageAccountName = \"destStorageAccount\",\n                DestinationStorageContainerName = \"destContainer\",\n            };\n\n            ArmOperation\u003cConfidentialLedgerFilesExportResult\u003e lro = await ledger.FilesExportAsync(WaitUntil.Completed, content);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Export succeeded: 2026-04-23T05:26:51.1412418Z **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger`
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1412680Z **Service directory:** `sdk/confidentialledger/Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger/`
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1412923Z **Triggered by:** commit ddfbd266d7373320c35a0f2984cc6bf1d03bfac5 (PR #58537) by @azure-sdk
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1412927Z 
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1413007Z ## What Changed
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1413011Z 
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1413696Z The package `Azure.ResourceManager.ConfidentialLedger` was published at **1.1.0** (stable), upgrading the API version to `2026-02-23`. This is the first stable release and introduced the package to the repository including:
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1413940Z - `ConfidentialLedgerResource` with a new `FilesExportAsync` long-running operation
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1414629Z - New model properties on `ConfidentialLedgerProperties`: `EnclavePlatform`, `ApplicationType`, `ScittConfiguration`, `HostLevel`, `MaxBodySizeInMb`, `SubjectName`, `NodeCount`, `WriteLBAddressPrefix`, `WorkerThreads`
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1414892Z - New enums: `ConfidentialLedgerEnclavePlatform`, `ConfidentialLedgerApplicationType`
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1414896Z 
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1415121Z The README was created from a boilerplate template with no service-specific content.
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1415125Z 
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1415197Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1415202Z 
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1415965Z - **No service-specific examples**: The "Examples" section only links to the generic management samples URL (`https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples`); there are no inline code examples or snippet placeholders (`\`\`\`C# Snippet:...\`\`\``)
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1416626Z - **No snippet test file**: `tests/Scenario/Samples/` does not exist; the generated samples in `tests/Generated/Samples/` are not wired to the README via `#region Snippet:` tags, so `Update-Snippets.ps1` produces no output
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1416999Z - **`FilesExportAsync` not documented**: The new LRO operation for exporting ledger files is not mentioned anywhere in the README
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1417898Z - **New model properties not documented**: `EnclavePlatform`, `ApplicationType`, `ScittConfiguration`, and the CCF tuning properties (`HostLevel`, `MaxBodySizeInMb`, `NodeCount`, etc.) added in 1.1.0 are not described
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1418585Z - **"Key concepts" section is generic**: Does not mention `ConfidentialLedgerResource`, `ConfidentialLedgerCollection`, `ConfidentialLedgerData`, or the supported operations (Get, Create, Update, Delete, FilesExport)
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1418590Z 
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1418661Z <details>

2026-04-23T05:26:51.1419301Z ### Step 1: Modify files

2026-04-23T05:26:51.1420139Z 1. **Key concepts** section — replace the generic link with a description of the main types:
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1420143Z 
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1420216Z ```markdown
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1420289Z ## Key concepts
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1420293Z 
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1420943Z - **`ConfidentialLedgerResource`** — Represents a provisioned Confidential Ledger instance. Supports get, update, delete, and the `FilesExportAsync` long-running operation.
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1421709Z - **`ConfidentialLedgerCollection`** — Scoped to a resource group; supports listing, creating, and checking for the existence of ledgers. Accessible via `ResourceGroupResource.GetConfidentialLedgers()`.
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1422215Z - **`ConfidentialLedgerData`** — Data bag for a ledger, including `Properties` (of type `ConfidentialLedgerProperties`), tags, and location.
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1423263Z - **`ConfidentialLedgerProperties`** — Configures ledger type (`ConfidentialLedgerType`), SKU (`ConfidentialLedgerSku`), AAD and certificate-based security principals, running state, enclave platform, application type, and SCITT configuration.
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1423336Z ```
2026-04-23T05:26:51.1423340Z
